'''wapuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedi|cedi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedi|cedi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wapuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæpihith|wæpihith]] || [[word:wæpihij|wæpihij]] || [[word:wæpihish|wæpihish]] || [[word:wæpihi|wæpihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapupuhuth|wapupuhuth]] || [[word:wapupuhuj|wapupuhuj]] || [[word:wapupuhush|wapupuhush]] || [[word:wapupuhu|wapupuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapuhuth|wapuhuth]] || [[word:wapuhuj|wapuhuj]] || [[word:wapuhush|wapuhush]] || [[word:wapuhu|wapuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapufhuth|wapufhuth]] || [[word:wapufhuj|wapufhuj]] || [[word:wapufhush|wapufhush]] || [[word:wapufhuf|wapufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wapuhuthu|wapuhuthu]] || [[word:wapuhuju|wapuhuju]] || [[word:wapuhushu|wapuhushu]] || [[word:wapuhuku|wapuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wapuhuth|wapuhuth]] || [[word:wapuhuj|wapuhuj]] || [[word:wapuhush|wapuhush]] || [[word:wapuhu|wapuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wapuhuthul|wapuhuthul]] || [[word:wapuhujul|wapuhujul]] || [[word:wapuhushul|wapuhushul]] || [[word:wapuhukul|wapuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wapuhuthuthu|wapuhuthuthu]] || [[word:wapuhujuju|wapuhujuju]] || [[word:wapuhushushu|wapuhushushu]] || [[word:wapuhuku|wapuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wapuhuthun|wapuhuthun]] || [[word:wapuhujun|wapuhujun]] || [[word:wapuhushun|wapuhushun]] || [[word:wapuhukun|wapuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wapuhuthuoro|wapuhuthuoro]] || [[word:wapuhujuoro|wapuhujuoro]] || [[word:wapuhushuoro|wapuhushuoro]] || [[word:wapuhukuoro|wapuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
